researchQuestions: Does the type of XAI method (Decision Tree vs Logistic Regression vs Hybrid explanations) affect users' ability to accurately simulate AI model behavior, as measured by both forward-simulation accuracy and counterfactual-simulation accuracy?

apparatus.description:
Software: qualtrics, python
Stimulus will be the explantions per instance shown to the user, the test material will be only testing so only data instances will be shown without erxplanations

procedure.title: Welcome & consent
procedure.note:
Study Title: The Effect of Explanation Type on User Understanding of AI Model Behavior

Principal Investigator: [Your Name], [Your Institution]

Purpose of the Study:
You are being invited to participate in a research study investigating how different types of AI explanations (Decision Tree, Logistic Regression, or Hybrid) affect how well users can understand and predict the behavior of an AI model trained on wine quality data.

What You Will Be Asked to Do:
You will be shown a series of AI predictions about wine quality, along with explanations of how the AI made those predictions. You will then be asked to predict what the AI would do on new instances, and to answer questions about the AI's decision-making.

Time Commitment:
The study is expected to take approximately 30 minutes.

Risks and Benefits:
There are no known risks associated with participating in this study. Your participation will contribute to research on explainable AI and human-AI interaction.

Confidentiality:
Your responses will be kept confidential. Data will be stored securely and only accessible to the research team.

Voluntary Participation:
Your participation is entirely voluntary. You may withdraw at any time without penalty.

By proceeding, you confirm that you have read and understood the above information and consent to participate.

procedure.title: Training — Step 1: Predict label from data instance only (no AI, no XAI)
Training — Step 2: See AI prediction + XAI explanation, make prediction
Training — Step 3: Feedback on both attempts
Test session
procedure.note: 18 trials with AI prediction + XAI explanation or without XAI + AI prediction, collecting your DVs

_rawAnswers.overview: Compare global explanation methods (Decision Tree vs Logistic Regression) to see which improves users' understanding of the AI model
_rawAnswers.rq: Does the type of XAI method (Decision Tree vs Logistic Regression vs Hybrid explanations) affect users' ability to accurately simulate AI model behavior, as measured by both forward-simulation accuracy and counterfactual-simulation accuracy?
_rawAnswers.variables:
Dependent variables: Accuracy, 0-1, percentage; Task Time in seconds.
Independent variable: XAI types, levels: {lime, shap, none}; Tested with XAI, levels: {True, False};
Control variable: AI model, xai accuracy, dataset
Random variable: gender, expertise, prior knowledge
_rawAnswers.design:
mixed: 3 (XAI Types, between) x 2 (Tested with XAI）
i will counterbalance the within-test trials with XAI by trials, meaning under each XAI type, between conditions, the trials are alternating between tested with and without XAI randomly
_rawAnswers.participants:
Target N is 150, per group N will be 50
Recruitment through prolific (participants must be above 18 years old)
There should be a consent form but there is no risk or hazard that might happen cuz it's done through survey and interface
leave the compensation as 10 dollars per survey for now
_rawAnswers.apparatus:
Software: qualtrics, python
Stimulus will be the explantions per instance shown to the user, the test material will be only testing so only data instances will be shown without erxplanations
_rawAnswers.procedure:
1. each trial will be in 3 stages: 1. only data instance, meter bars and make prediction 2. show XAI to predict again, 3. check AI and XAI prediction feedback

and each session will have 20 traiing and 10 testing and the testing is only step 1 of training
_rawAnswers.dataset:
The AI should be MLP model
The dataset that I will choose will be the adult income dataset
_rawAnswers.sd_ivs: [{"factor":"xai_type","label":"XAI Type","levels":"Decision Tree | Logistic Regression | Hybrid","alloc":"Between-subjects","balancing":""},{"factor":"user_task","label":"User Task","levels":"Forward simulation | Counterfactual simulation","alloc":"Within-subjects","balancing":"Full counterbalancing"}]
